ddls:
CREATE TABLE "environments" (
  "env_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "env_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment */,
  "env_description" TEXT /* Description of the environment */,
  "obs_space" TEXT /* Observation space of the environment */,
  "action_space" TEXT /* Action space of the environment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the environment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the environment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("env_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episodes" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode */,
  "env_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment where the episode took place */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent that participated in the episode */,
  "timestep" INTEGER /* Timestep of the episode */,
  "reward" REAL /* Reward received by the agent during the episode */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the episode started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the episode ended */,
  "episode_status" TEXT /* Status of the episode (e.g., completed, ongoing, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episodes_env_id FOREIGN KEY ("env_id") REFERENCES environments ("env_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episodes_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the agent */,
  "agent_description" TEXT /* Description of the agent */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Reinforcement learning algorithm used by the agent */,
  "model_file_path" TEXT /* Path to the pre-trained model file */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* JSON string storing hyperparameters of the algorithm */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the agent was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode where the action was taken */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the agent */,
  "action_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was taken */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., discrete, continuous) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "obs_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode where the observation was made */,
  "observation" TEXT /* Observation received by the agent */,
  "observation_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the observation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("obs_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode where the reward was received */,
  "reward" REAL /* Reward received by the agent */,
  "reward_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reward was received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rewards_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)
